content.en:
Thousands of Level 3 battlefields!

When Ye Tian heard this, he was taken aback.

From this point of view, how powerful the Innate Origin Domain Alliance is, the Infinite Domain is nothing at all in the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, and it is estimated that even the Infinite Heavenly Emperor is nothing.

This Ao Xun Dragon Venerable continued: "There are many geniuses in the Heavenly Blood Battlefield, and many of them can fight beyond the level of the Supreme Dao Realm, even the Sixfold Supreme Dao Realm that has comprehended the rules of the seventh sequence of the Supreme Dao may fall and die. "

The sixfold Dao realm that received the seventh sequence of the Supreme Dao rules is likely to fall?

Ye Tian was a little surprised.

It seems that the Heavenly Blood Battlefield is not as simple as he imagined!

"Ao Xun Dragon Venerable, why did the Supreme Dao Blood Demon and your Heavenly Dragon Domain invest so much into the Supreme Dao Realm?" Ye Tian was very curious.

"Don't you know?" Ao Xun Dragon Venerable was puzzled, but he still explained to Ye Tian, "Because our Heavenly Dragon Domain gave birth to a kind of Heavenly Dragon Blood Crystal Vein, this Heavenly Dragon Blood Crystal has a great attraction to the Supreme Dao Blood Demon, and it can easily help them break through the realm. If the Supreme Dao Blood Demon occupies our Heavenly Dragon Domain, it will inevitably cultivate many powerful Supreme Dao Void Demons. And the Heavenly Blood Battlefield was not deliberately arranged by us, but the Supreme Dao Blood Demon invaded in, and there was no way, so we arranged the third-level battlefield array to envelop the invading Supreme Dao Void Demon together. "

"Moreover, the Heavenly Blood Battlefield also has a small number of Heavenly Dragon Blood Crystal Veins, which is enough to attract these Supreme Dao Blood Demons, and they will not attack the Heavenly Dragon Domain at all costs!"

"But for countless years, our Heavenly Dragon Domain has lost too much Supreme Dao Realm, otherwise, our Heavenly Dragon Domain would not be so weak!"

Ao Xun Dragon Venerable sighed, obviously feeling sorry for the future of the Heavenly Dragon Domain.

However, the Celestial Dragon Domain was much better than many ordinary Innate Origin Domains.

Like the Infinite Domain, it is so weak, once the calamity comes, how many will it fall to the Dao Realm, maybe it will completely decline!

Soon.

The entrance to the Heavenly Blood Battlefield has arrived.

"Ye Tian, the entrance to the Heavenly Blood Battlefield has arrived, you can enter with the battlefield order. Ao Xun Longzun said.

"Thank you Ao Xun Longzun for leading the way!"

Ye Tian immediately entered the Heavenly Blood Battlefield.

Ao Xun Dragon Venerable entered the Heavenly Blood Battlefield and shook his head slightly, he attracted many geniuses from other Innate Origin Domains, but most of them fell, and a few fled from here in fright.

Maybe it won't be long before Ye Tian will do the same.

After all, in terms of cultivation, Ye Tian is only a fourfold Dao realm, no matter how powerful he is, he is at most comparable to the sixth-fold Dao realm, and he is cannon fodder in the Heavenly Blood Battlefield.

However, he didn't know that Ye Tian was taking the path of supreme strength and supreme path, otherwise he wouldn't have this idea.

There are only a few high-level people in the Heavenly Dragon Domain who really know Ye Tian's strength.

......

Heavenly Blood Battlefield.

Heavenly Blood City III.

Ye Tian appeared here, and he didn't kill those Supreme Dao Void Demons for the first time, but learned about the situation here.

Temple of Heavenly Blood.

This is the place to exchange resources for war exploits.

At this time, many Supreme Dao Realms were chatting here, discussing the latest battlefield information.

"You've heard that our Heavenly Dragon Domain's peerless genius, His Highness Long Xu, a sixfold Supreme Dao realm powerhouse, has been severely injured by the Sixfold Supreme Dao Void Demon Battle River. "

"No, His Royal Highness Long Xu is a peerless genius who has comprehended the rules of the seventh sequence of the Supreme Dao, if it weren't for the Supreme Dao Void Demon on the Heavenly Blood Battlefield, he would have already hit the Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realm, and His Royal Highness Long Xu was actually hit hard?"

"It's true, that Supreme Dao Void Demon Battle River's strength is incomparably terrifying, no less than the sevenfold Dao realm combat power, it is said to have an incomparably terrifying bloodline, and the strength cannot be described as the sixfold Dao realm. "

"The Dao Void Demon Battle River is so terrifying, I don't know if our Highness Longwu of the Heavenly Dragon Domain can defeat it?"

Zhanhe, Longwu, Longxu......

Ye Tian listened to these names and secretly wrote them down.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian also knew a piece of information - the Heavenly Blood Killing List!

This is the use of an eight-pattern supreme dao weapon in the Heavenly Dragon Domain, the Heavenly Blood Scroll, to be integrated into the third-level battlefield, recording the killing information, the more supreme Dao Void Demons killed, the more hope there is to enter the Heavenly Blood Killing List.

But once it falls, it will also disappear from the Heavenly Blood Kill List.

Of course.

The Dao Void Demon Killing Heavenly Dragon Domain to the Dao Realm will also enter this list.

Therefore, the Heavenly Blood Killing List is divided into two lists, one is the Heavenly Blood Heavenly Dragon List, and the other is the Heavenly Blood Void Demon List, and the two lists together are the Heavenly Blood Killing List.

Once you enter the Heavenly Blood Kill List, you will have a high bounty, and once you kill it, you will get a lot of combat merits.

"The battle exploits of the Heavenly Dragon Domain can even be exchanged for the seventh sequence of Dao rule items!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

If it is in the Wuji Domain, there is no way to exchange this kind of treasure, because there are no Taisu Palace and Wuji Heavenly Palace, but the Tianlong Domain does.

However, even in the Heavenly Dragon Domain, there are not many, and only a million combat merits can be exchanged for a seventh sequence supreme rule item.

However, countless people are eager to obtain such a seventh-sequence supreme path rule item, after all, once they obtain it, it is possible to comprehend the seventh-sequence supreme path rule!

Therefore, many of the Sixfold Supreme Dao Realm entered here just for the seventh sequence of Supreme Dao rule items!

......

"The difference between killing an ordinary Supreme Dao Void Demon and killing the Heavenly Blood Void Demon on the Heavenly Blood Void Demon list is too big. "

Ye Tian was stunned after seeing the battle merit reward on the Heavenly Blood Void Demon List.

Like an ordinary Sixfold Supreme Dao Realm, even if you kill it, you can get at most 10,000 battle merits, but killing a Supreme Dao Void Demon on the Heavenly Blood Void Demon List can get at least hundreds of thousands of battle merits, including millions of battle merits.

"You still have to kill the Supreme Dao Void Demons on the Heavenly Blood Void Demon List in order to gain a large number of battle merits, and kill those Triple and Quadruple Supreme Dao Void Demons, and you will get very few battle merits!"

However, if he really encounters a weak Supreme Dao Void Demon, he will also kill it, at least he can get a little gift from the origin of heaven and earth!

After Ye Tian recorded the information on the Heavenly Blood Void Demon List, he prepared to sneak into the real battlefield.

Dragon's Whisker River.

This is a relatively important battlefield area of the Heavenly Blood Battlefield, just because small Heavenly Blood Dragon Crystal veins are occasionally bred in the Dragon Whisker River, even if there are no ore veins, one or two Heavenly Blood Dragon Crystals can occasionally be found.

Gradually, a relatively important battlefield was formed here, and from time to time, a large number of battles between Dao realms would break out.

this day.

Ye Tian came to the Dragon Whisker River.

His cultivation of the Quadruple Dao Realm is very inconspicuous here, and it will definitely not attract attention.

But it was precisely because of his low cultivation that he could approach the Supreme Dao Void Demon on the Heavenly Blood Void Demon List, and if it was a very famous Supreme Dao Realm, he would have been locked in a long time ago.

Therefore, the powerhouses on the two lists of the Heavenly Blood Killing List are rarely killed.
